projects.name: BookKaro-Uber Clone
projects.description: Production-grade ride-hailing platform with real-time driver dispatch, wallet management, and live ride tracking. Built with React on the frontend and Java Spring Boot REST APIs on the backend.

projects.name: MediCore-Hospital Management
projects.description: Enterprise hospital management system with patient records, doctor scheduling, and billing modules. Java Spring Boot microservices architecture with PostgreSQL and secure JWT authentication.

projects.name: Travel World
projects.description: E-commerce platform for booking travel packages with cart, authentication and checkout flow. Built with React, Redux Toolkit, and a Node.js backend with PostgreSQL.

projects.name: Chat App
projects.description: Real-time chat application with Socket.io enabling instant messaging, chat rooms, and presence indicators. Node.js & Express backend with room-based architecture.

projects.name: Voting DApp
projects.description: Decentralized voting application built on Ethereum blockchain with smart contracts. Secure, transparent voting system with real-time results and voter verification.
